meta.notes: Survival CDF of per-occupation share of tasks exposed to AI. weighting=time_share is our s(t,o) time-share weighting (onet2fraction_exposed_time_weighted); weighting=task_category is the Eloundou et al. core(1.0)/supplemental(0.5) task-category weighting (onet2fraction_exposed). measure=simulation is Wan/Alex with Alex exposure_threshold 0.25/0.50; measure=rubric is Hosseini/HM&L with threshold 0.25=T2/T3/T4 (moderate+high) and threshold 0.50=T3/T4 (high only). All series share the same Alex task universe. y = arange(n,0,-1)/n over ascending-sorted shares.

series.label: Simulation-Based-Exposure, time-share weighted (ours) (moderate + high exposure tasks)
